# Supernote fixtures

Synthetic Supernote X-series `.note` files for `tests/test_supernote.py`,
generated by `make_fixture.py` in this directory:

```sh
uv run python tests/fixtures/supernote/make_fixture.py
```

- `synthetic-two-page.note` — 2 portrait pages, RATTA_RLE MAINLAYER only.
  Page 1: black square (300,400)-(700,800) + gray band
  (200,1000)-(1200,1100); page 2: dark-gray rectangle.
- `synthetic-landscape.note` — 1 page, `ORIENTATION:1090`, black
  rectangle (1000,200)-(1600,600) in a 1872x1404 bitmap.

## Provenance

These are NOT files from a real device and contain no third-party data.
The upstream `supernotelib` repository (github.com/jya-dev/supernote-tool,
checked at commit `ee03e100170f9d48f3740c46cd47e51857c05202`, 2026-07)
ships no `.note` test assets, so the generator reimplements the container
layout from supernotelib's own parser/decoder source (`parser.py`,
`decoder.py`, `manipulator.py`): file type + `SN_FILE_VER_*` signature,
length-prefixed `<KEY:VALUE>` metadata blocks, footer address trailer,
and RATTA_RLE bitmap encoding. Signature `SN_FILE_VER_20220011`
corresponds to the Chauvet 2.5.17 firmware era.

Both files are validated in tests by round-tripping through
`supernotelib.load_notebook(..., policy="strict")` and its
`ImageConverter` (pixel-exact rectangle checks).
